daily.today_energy: Your intuition is absolutely *sending* today, Pisces. Trust those gut feelings—they're picking up on something real. Channel that dreamy energy into something creative and watch what unfolds.
daily.love: Someone's picking up on your vibe and it's mutual. Whether you're coupled up or solo, today's about authentic connection. Drop the walls a little and let people see the real you.
daily.career: Your ideas have serious potential right now. Don't sleep on that thought that popped into your head this morning. Speaking up in meetings could lead somewhere unexpected and genuinely good.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Move in ways that feel good—yoga, a walk, dancing in your room, whatever. Rest isn't lazy, it's strategic energy management.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to trust your intuition more than usual. Mercury's influence brings clarity to situations that felt foggy before. You're entering a phase where your natural empathy becomes your superpower—lean into it.
weekly.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, authentic vulnerability is your love language this week. Stop overthinking and let people see the real you. A conversation you've been avoiding might actually go way better than expected.
weekly.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different right now. This is the perfect moment to pitch that project or suggest a fresh approach. Your colleagues are more receptive to your vision than you think. Trust your instincts.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for balance—not restriction. Move in ways that feel good, rest when you need to, and listen to what your energy is telling you. Mental clarity comes from honoring your natural rhythms this week.
